title: Fluffy Herbal Raw Friendly Bread Crumble
description: A cozy Argentinean dish featuring a blend of fresh herbs and raw-friendly bread crumbled into a soft, savory base.

ingredients.name: Raw friendly vegan butter or oil

instructions: Slice the bread into small pieces and place them in a microwave-safe bowl.
Microwave on high for about 30 seconds, then turn off the microwave. Let sit for a minute.
In a separate mixing bowl, combine sliced bread with fresh herbs and raw friendly vegan butter or oil.
Gently fold the mixture to incorporate all ingredients evenly.
